mapper.insert: insert into inventorytransactions (TransactionType, DeviceName, ModelNumber, Quantity, FromWarehouse, TransactionDate, Employee) values ('出库',#{deviceName},#{modelNumber},#{quantity},#{warehouse},#{dateTime},#{name})

insert into inventorytransactions (TransactionType, DeviceName, ModelNumber, Quantity, ToWarehouse, TransactionDate, Employee) values ('入库',#{deviceName},#{modelNumber},#{quantity},#{warehouse},#{dateTime},#{name})

insert into inventorytransactions (TransactionType, DeviceName, ModelNumber, Quantity, FromWarehouse,ToWarehouse, TransactionDate, Employee) values ('调拨',#{deviceName},#{modelNumber},#{quantity},#{outWarehouse},#{inWarehouse},#{dateTime},#{name})

insert into inventorytransactions (TransactionType, DeviceName, ModelNumber, Quantity, FromWarehouse,ToWarehouse, TransactionDate, Employee,BeforeEdit) values ('修改',#{deviceName},#{modelNumber},#{quantity},#{warehouse},#{warehouse},#{dateTime},#{name},#{beforeEdit})
